title: Requirement set (canonical document file)
description: One file per published requirement revision: data/requirement-sets/<slug>.json (slug convention: '<subject-slug>-<effective-year>'). Requirement sets are IMMUTABLE dated documents, not versioned entities: a revision is a NEW document whose 'supersedes' points at the previous one. 'subject' targets a merit badge today; ranks and awards reuse this schema unchanged. COPYRIGHT: requirement 'text' is Scouting America's. When verbatim text is present, set includes_official_text=true AND a 'text_rights' statement (enforced below) — the text is reproduced with attribution for non-commercial use and is NOT covered by this dataset's CC BY-NC-SA license. 'summary' (original paraphrase) is an optional supplement. See NOTICE.md.

subject.description: The badge/rank/award these requirements belong to, e.g. 'merit-badge:first-aid'.

effective_from.description: When this revision took effect (transition/grandfathering rules go in 'notes').

effective_to.description: When a later revision superseded this one; null = current.

supersedes.description: The immediately previous revision; null = earliest known (not necessarily first ever).

source_document.description: The publication this revision was transcribed from.

includes_official_text.description: True iff any requirement node carries verbatim 'text'. Lets a publish step strip or withhold official text wholesale. The flag <-> text-presence correspondence is a PIPELINE-ENFORCED invariant (see TODO.md 'Pipeline validator'); never trust the boolean alone.

text_rights.description: Rights statement for any verbatim requirement `text` in this set. REQUIRED when includes_official_text is true: requirement text is Scouting America's copyright, reproduced with attribution for non-commercial use and NOT covered by this dataset's CC BY-NC-SA license. See NOTICE.md.

Requirement.title: Requirement
Requirement.description: One node of the requirement tree. At least one of text/summary/children must be present. 'choose' = complete N of the children (null = all children required). Option groups (e.g. 'do 7a OR 7b') are a parent node with choose=1.

text.description: Verbatim official requirement text (© Scouting America). Presence requires includes_official_text=true + text_rights (see NOTICE.md).

summary.description: Optional original-prose paraphrase/gloss. Not a substitute for the official text; carries no third-party copyright.

choose.description: Complete this many of 'children'; null = all. Meaningful only with children (pipeline rule).
